particulars.description: A first fixed charge on all that leasehold property known as 9 manfield park cranleigh surrey and a floating charge on all the undertaking and all assets rights and income of the company both present and future provided that the charge over the rent deposit and interest accrued under the terms of the rent deposit shall have priority at all times over the security hereby created.

secured_details.description: The principal sum of £21,150 due or to become due from the company to the chargee

persons_entitled.name: Walter Reginald Grist and Andrew Grist
